name: Isha Bhatia
summary: UI/UX Designer with 2 years of experience in mobile app design and web interfaces for ed-tech and lifestyle brands. Comfortable with end-to-end design process — from wireframes to handoff. Currently expanding skills in motion design and design system management. Looking for a product-design role in a design-led company.

experience.title: UI/UX Designer
responsibilities: Designed 3 new feature flows for Vedantu's K-12 learning app — practice test module, live class schedule redesign, and progress report screen.
Conducted 5 usability tests per quarter with students and parents; reduced task completion time by 20% on redesigned flows.
Created wireframes and hi-fi prototypes in Figma with clear annotation for dev handoff.
Contributed 20 components to the Vedantu app design system.
Collaborated with content, product, and engineering teams in 2-week design sprints.

experience.title: UI Design Intern
responsibilities: Designed landing pages and social media creatives for 6 client brands.
Assisted senior designer in mobile app screens for a fashion e-commerce client.
Learned Figma auto layout and created reusable component sets.

projects.name: Vedantu Practice Test Redesign
projects.description: Redesigned practice test interface for K-12 students — improved readability, added timer visibility, and reduced cognitive load. Task completion rate improved from 72% to 89% post-test.

projects.name: FreshCart – Grocery App UI
projects.description: Designed a clean, minimal grocery shopping app UI as a personal portfolio project. Features cart management, search, and order tracking flows.

achievements: Pearl Academy Design Showcase – Runner-Up (Final Year Project 2022)
